record.field: Hi {{ format_datetime(object.partner_id.name }}, reminder: {{ object.appointment_type_id.name }} on {{ object.start_datetime, dt_format='short') }}. Ref: {{ object.name }}. {{ object.company_id.name }}

Hi {{ format_datetime(object.partner_id.name }}, your appointment {{ object.appointment_type_id.name }} on {{ object.start_datetime, dt_format='short') }} is confirmed. Ref: {{ object.name }}. {{ object.company_id.name }}
